/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -g -g CMakeFiles/Sandwich_Roulette.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sandwich_Roulette.dir/src/Fs_Interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sandwich_Roulette.dir/src/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sandwich_Roulette.dir/src/Sandwich.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Sandwich_Roulette.dir/src/Roulette.cpp.o -o Sandwich_Roulette
